label: Fantasy
outlineTemplate: Hero's journey: Call to adventure → Trials → Growth → Final confrontation
namingConvention: Fantasy naming: evocative, slightly archaic (e.g., Kael, Rowen, Aelith)
pacingRules: Slow build in book 1, escalation in book 2, climactic in book 3
upgradeSystem: Power progression: Novice → Apprentice → Adept → Master → Legendary
